    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    M

    main(String[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.GUI
     
    makeMove() - Methode in Klasse players.CPUPlayer
    Calculates the next move for the current CPU player based on the defined strategy.
    makeRemove() - Methode in Klasse players.CPUPlayer
    Calculates the next removal action for the current CPU player based on the defined strategy.
    MAX_STONES - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    MEDIUM - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse difficulties.DifficultyLevel
     
    MediumDifficulty - Klasse in difficulties
    Represents a strategy for the medium difficulty in the game.
    MediumDifficulty() - Konstruktor für Klasse difficulties.MediumDifficulty
     
    MENU_SCREEN_NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    menuBar - Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    MenuBar - Klasse in view
    This class creates the menu bar for the game, which includes a "Help" menu and a "Credits" menu.
    MenuBar() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.MenuBar
     
    MenuScreenPanel - Klasse in view
    This class creates the menu screen panel for the game, which includes buttons for starting a new game, loading a game, and returning to the home screen.
    MenuScreenPanel() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.MenuScreenPanel
     
    mode - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    mode - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    Move - Klasse in persistance
    Represents a snapshot of the game state at a particular moment.
    Move(int, int, Map<Integer, Node>, boolean, GamePhase, GamePhase, int, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse persistance.Move
    Constructs a Move object representing the game state at a specific moment.
    MoveData - Klasse in persistance
    Represents a serializable snapshot of a move from the history.
    MoveData(int, int, Map<Integer, Integer>, boolean, String, String, int, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse persistance.MoveData
    Creates a new MoveData instance capturing the state of the game at a specific move.
    moveListener - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    moveStone(PlayerEntity, Node, Node) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Moves a Stone from one Node to another if the move is valid according to the rules.
    MovingPhase - Klasse in phases
    This class represents the moving phase of the game, where players can move their stones to neighbours nodes on the board.
    MovingPhase(PlayerEntity) - Konstruktor für Klasse phases.MovingPhase
    Sets the context.
    movingPhaseMoves() - Methode in Klasse players.ImaginativePlayer
    Helper method for the ImaginativePlayer.getAllPossibleMoves() method.
